message:
# CamPart
A simple, but powerful Camera-Part-Setter
***
### Description
CamPart is a Free Roblox Studio Plugin developed by Seem, which lets you set your Camera to any selected BasePart.
The Plugin also offers a smooth Realtime-Viewer - a ViewportFrame that renders the environment within a Radius.

Documentation: 
Youtube Video(Quick Guide): 

### Features
- **CamPart - Panel:**
  - *Camera to Selected*: Moves the Camera to the selected BasePart
  - *Rotate by +10*: Rotates the Camera by +10 on the Y-Axis(horizontal).
  - *Rotate by -10*: Rotates the Camera by -10 on the Y-Axis(horizontal).
- **RealtimeView - Panel:**
  How to use:
  1. Select a BasePart
  2. Click "Enable"
  3. "Click Refresh"(the Refresh button always refreshes the Viewport, "fixing bugs")
    - *Radius*: Select a BasePart, then click the "Radius" button and type in a *positive number*. You can see the radius by the black sphere appearing at the selected BasePart.
    - *DragableEdge*: Hold the white edge and drag it up and down to adjust the visible screen to your liking.
    - *Sync ViewportFrame*: Syncs your actual Studio ViewportFrame with the RealtimeView-ViewportFrame. This ensures that the RealtimeView only shows what you would see when you click "Camera to Selected" on a BasePart.
- **Message - Panel:**
  The Message Panel is used to inform you about any news from Seem, such as new Plugins, updates or assets - benefits just for you!
  If a new Message was sent(by Seem), a small Bell will blink till you read(opened the Panel) the new Message.
  *Seem will not sent irrelevant information! Messages are used to inform you about Plugin-Bugs, Assets or General Important information from Seem!*
